meta.title: 介词：时间/地点/固定搭配

objectives.text: 掌握时间介词 at/on/in 的用法
掌握地点介词 in/on/under/behind/next to 的用法
了解常见介词固定搭配

knowledge.title: 时间介词 at / on / in

blocks.content: 英语中三个最常用的时间介词是 **at**、**on** 和 **in**，它们的用法各有不同。

rows: at 7:00, at noon, at night, at the moment
on Monday, on June 1st, on my birthday, on a sunny day
in May, in 2024, in summer, in the morning

blocks.title: 记忆技巧
blocks.content: at 点、on 天、in 长时间。at 精确到点，on 精确到天，in 覆盖较长时段。
常用的地点介词表示物体之间的空间关系：

rows: The book is in the bag. 书在书包里。
The cup is on the table. 杯子在桌上。
The cat is under the bed. 猫在床下。
The tree is behind the house. 树在房子后面。
The car is in front of the building. 车在楼前面。
She sits next to me. 她坐在我旁边。
The park is between the bank and the school. 公园在银行和学校之间。

blocks.content: 英语中有许多**介词固定搭配**（短语动词/介词短语），需要整体记忆。

rows: Look at the blackboard. 看黑板。
Listen to the music. 听音乐。
She is good at math. 她擅长数学。
I am interested in science. 我对科学感兴趣。
He stayed home because of the rain. 他因为下雨待在家。

blocks.title: 易错提醒
blocks.content: 注意区分 because（连词，后接句子）和 because of（介词短语，后接名词/代词）。

problem.content: We have a meeting _____ 3 o'clock _____ Tuesday.

solution.content: 3 o'clock 是具体时间点用 at，Tuesday 是具体某天用 on。答案选 C。

problem.content: She is interested _____ playing the piano.

solution.content: interested in 是固定搭配，表示「对……感兴趣」。答案选 B。

children.text: in + 月/年/季节（in May, in summer）
in 在里面，on 在上面
under 在下面，behind 在后面
next to 在旁边，between 在之间
look at, listen to, good at
because + 句子，because of + 名词
